pi_items.source: File system inspection: Only task.json and verifier.py exist in exterior_lighting_submeter_setup task directory. Hooks reference 'C:\workspace\tasks\exterior_lighting_submeter_setup\setup_task.ps1' and 'export_result.ps1' but these files are absent. Similar tasks (modify_wall_absorptance, cool_roof_economizer_package) have these files present in their directories.

privileged_info_summary: The 4StoreyBuilding.inp is a real 3,258-line, 94KB multi-story commercial building model from official eQUEST training workbook examples (doe2.com). eQUEST 3.65 build 7175 is the actual simulation software being used. The task requires creating a dusk-to-dawn lighting schedule (ON hours 19-24 and 1-6, OFF hours 7-18), an electric meter named 'Ext Lighting Meter', and an exterior lighting load of 4.5 kW assigned to that meter and schedule. The project will be located in C:\Users\Docker\Documents\eQUEST 3-65 Projects\4StoreyBuilding\ as a subdirectory created by eQUEST during BDL import. Critical issue: The PowerShell setup_task.ps1 and export_result.ps1 scripts referenced in the task hooks are missing from the task directory, unlike all other similar eQUEST tasks.
